common.notFoundDescription: The requested page does not exist or is no longer available.

statusCard.title: Network status
statusCard.description: Live values from the Minecraft server status API.

home.metaDescription: Premium Minecraft infrastructure, global networking, modern tooling, and a reliable community platform.
home.title: Minecraft, engineered for what comes next.
home.description: A reliable platform for players, communities, and operators—built around performance, transparent systems, and a long-term product architecture.
home.statusDescription: Live values appear only when the status API is connected.
home.sectionTitle: One ecosystem. Clear boundaries. Ready to scale.
home.sectionDescription: Every surface shares the same design system, localization layer, and API contracts.

performance.title: Performance first
performance.description: Infrastructure boundaries are prepared for proxy, compatibility, and monitoring integrations without coupling the interface to a provider.

global.title: Global by design
global.description: Locale-aware routing, accessible interaction, and responsive layouts are part of the foundation—not later additions.

observable.title: Observable systems
observable.description: Status, statistics, and administrative surfaces consume replaceable typed API contracts and never invent operational data.

home.platformDescription: Public, player, and operational experiences remain consistent while evolving independently.
home.ctaTitle: A better foundation for every world.
home.ctaDescription: Connect when server details are published, or explore the documentation today.

play.metaDescription: Official connection information for AlexMCHub Java and Bedrock editions.
play.title: Choose your edition.
play.description: Official connection details are displayed only when they are configured by the network team.

one.title: Java Edition
one.description: Desktop connection information with a copy-ready server address.

two.title: Bedrock Edition
two.description: Mobile and console connection information with explicit address and port.

three.title: Verified details
three.description: No estimated versions, player counts, or connection values are presented.

downloads.metaDescription: Official AlexMCHub client and launcher downloads.
downloads.title: Downloads you can trust.
downloads.description: Signed client software and release information will be published here through the download API.

one.title: Launcher
one.description: Prepared for platform-specific releases, checksums, and signed distribution metadata.

two.title: Integrity
two.description: The download contract supports version, size, signature, and checksum verification.

three.title: Release channels
three.description: Stable and preview channels can be introduced without changing the page architecture.

documentation.metaDescription: Guides and technical documentation for AlexMCHub.
documentation.title: Build context, not confusion.
documentation.description: Structured, searchable guidance for players, operators, and future integration developers.

one.title: Getting started
one.description: Connection, client, and account guidance organized around clear user outcomes.

two.title: Operations
two.description: Architecture-ready sections for networking, permissions, monitoring, and deployment.

three.title: Markdown ready
three.description: Content boundaries are ready to move to localized Markdown or a content platform.

wiki.metaDescription: AlexMCHub gameplay and community knowledge base.
wiki.title: A shared source of truth.
wiki.description: Gameplay systems, community policies, and world knowledge can live in a localized, searchable catalog.

one.title: Gameplay
one.description: Prepared for mechanics, progression, commands, and world-specific guides.

two.title: Community
two.description: Policies and contribution guidance share consistent revision metadata.

three.title: Searchable
three.description: The content model is ready for a dedicated full-text search provider.

status.metaDescription: Live operational status for AlexMCHub services.
status.title: Network status, without guesswork.
status.description: Service health appears only when verified data is returned by the monitoring API.

one.title: Minecraft network
one.description: Current state: unavailable until the server API is connected.

two.title: Authentication
two.description: Current state: unavailable until an authentication provider is connected.

three.title: Platform APIs
three.description: Current state: unavailable until monitoring is connected.

statistics.metaDescription: Verified player and network statistics for AlexMCHub.
statistics.title: Measured, never manufactured.
statistics.description: Player and network metrics remain empty until a verified statistics source is connected.

one.title: Player activity
one.description: Prepared for privacy-aware aggregate activity from the player statistics API.

two.title: Network performance
two.description: Prepared for Prometheus and Grafana time-series data.

three.title: World insights
three.description: Prepared for map and gameplay analytics with explicit data provenance.

store.title: Commerce with clear boundaries.
store.description: The storefront is prepared for product catalogs, regional formatting, and a dedicated payment API.

one.title: Catalog
one.description: Localized products and pricing will come from the commerce API.

two.title: Payments
two.description: Payment processing remains isolated from the presentation layer.

three.title: Entitlements
three.description: Purchases can map to server permissions through a future audited workflow.

dashboard.title: Your network, in one place.
dashboard.description: Account, play, purchase, and statistics modules are ready for an authenticated player session.

three.title: Entitlements
three.description: Store and permission data are not connected.

profile.title: Your player identity.
profile.description: Prepared for Microsoft, offline, and hybrid authentication without binding the UI to one identity provider.

three.title: Hybrid
three.description: Future account linking and conflict resolution workflow.

settings.title: Control your experience.
settings.description: Locale, privacy, communication, and account settings share one extensible preference model.

one.title: Language
one.description: Your selected language is remembered across visits.

two.title: Privacy
two.description: Prepared for explicit consent and data visibility controls.

three.title: Notifications
three.description: Prepared for opt-in email, Discord, and platform notifications.

api.metaDescription: Frontend contracts and future API integration documentation for AlexMCHub.
api.title: Stable contracts for evolving systems.
api.description: Typed frontend boundaries are prepared for server, payment, monitoring, map, and player APIs.

one.title: Typed contracts
one.description: Responses use explicit availability states instead of fabricated fallback values.

two.title: Provider adapters
two.description: External systems integrate behind replaceable adapters.

three.title: Versioning
three.description: The architecture supports additive versioning and migration without page rewrites.

admin.title: Operate with confidence.
admin.description: A frontend shell for servers, players, plugins, permissions, network health, and audit activity.

one.title: Infrastructure
one.description: Server, proxy, compatibility, and monitoring data are not connected.

two.title: Access control
two.description: LuckPerms and administrator identity are not connected.

three.title: Auditability
three.description: Administrative events remain empty until an audited API is connected.
